message:
test(labruntime): port 30 snapshot_engine tests to asupersync RuntimeFixture

Ports 9 run_async_test() and 15 #[tokio::test] snapshot_engine tests plus
6 new telemetry/trigger tests to RuntimeFixture::current_thread().block_on().

Uses StorageHandle to bootstrap DB schema (creates mux_sessions,
session_checkpoints, mux_pane_state tables) since rusqlite is not a
dev-dependency.

Covers: capture (single/multi/minimal pane), dedup (periodic/manual/event/
shutdown/work_completed), cleanup (retention count), mark_shutdown,
shutdown_checkpoint, session reuse, increasing checkpoint IDs,
trigger serde roundtrip, telemetry counters.

Skips: 16 intelligent_*/periodic_*/emit_trigger_* tests (require
runtime_compat::task::spawn), private-access tests (compute_state_hash,
generate_session_id, trigger_value, is_immediate_trigger, as_db_str,
open_conn) — these remain as unit tests.

Bead: ft-22x4r

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
